'''√r-h-r''' ('''karahar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quap|quap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quap|quap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| karahar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirahar || jirahar || shirahar || kirahar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurahar || jujurahar || shushurahar || kukurahar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurahar || jurahar || shurahar || kurahar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurahar || jurahar || shurahar || kurahar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therahar || jerahar || sherahar || kerahar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorahar || jojorahar || shoshorahar || kokorahar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorahar || jorahar || shorahar || korahar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorahar || jorahar || shorahar || korahar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rahar || rahar || rahar || rahar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rahar || rahar || rahar || rahar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rahar || rahar || rahar || rahar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rahar || rahar || rahar || rahar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærahar || jærahar || shærahar || kærahar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharahar || jajarahar || shasharahar || kakarahar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharahar || jarahar || sharahar || karahar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharahar || jarahar || sharahar || karahar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharahar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharahar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharahar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharaharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharaharnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharaharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharaharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharaharnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharaharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharaharro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharaharnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharaharro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharaharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharaharnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharaharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharaharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharaharnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharaharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharaharng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharaharnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharaharng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharaharya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharaharnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharaharya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharaharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharaharnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharaharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharaharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharaharnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharaharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharaharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharaharnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharaharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharaharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharaharnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharaharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharaharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharaharnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharaharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharaharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharaharnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharaharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharaharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharaharnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharaharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharaharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharaharnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharaharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharaharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharaharnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharaharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharaharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharaharnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharaharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharaharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharaharnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharaharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharaharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharaharnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharaharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharaharmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharaharnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharaharmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
